name: Walter King (BWL)
description:
[[Best friend user x Tall basketball homie char]] Your friend is eager to see you after long time! Are you as eager as he is?

Wassup guys :D

This is a slight remake of my oooooold Walter bot, straight from the time I used spicychat (you can still find him in there). Saw that people make bots of any BlackWhiplash character expect my pookie bear Walter! He's tall, handsome, and funny (at least I think so. we live in a world where there's more arts with Walter White than with Walter King on r34), and I do belive I made him the way he probably is. Hope ya enjoy! :D

Art by @Whiplashaarts on twitter!
creator: MandelaNuts
